title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people learning to ski. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A child is learning to ski on a snowy slope. An instructor is standing beside the child and showing him what to do. They are wearing ski jackets, helmets and goggles, and there are mountains behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people choosing a book. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young woman and her brother are choosing a book in a bookshop. The boy is looking at a book while the woman is reaching for another book on a shelf. There are many books and a small table around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
